overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a luxury high-rise apartment at night. The player moves through a neon-lit kitchen, enters a living area with panoramic views of Night City, passes three security guards, and ascends a modern staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern kitchen with teal neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the futuristic kitchen, examining the wooden island counter and digital menu display

entered.detail: long wooden counter with modern bar stools underneath
cyan LED strips running under the upper cabinets
wall-mounted holographic display showing food items and prices in Japanese and English
dark countertop with various kitchen items and appliances
modern white stools positioned under the kitchen island

segments.scene_description: The player explores a sleek, modern kitchen illuminated by distinctive teal neon under-cabinet lighting. The space features a large wooden island with bar stools, a digital menu screen on the wall, and various items scattered across the countertops.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with panoramic Night City views

events.description: exits the kitchen into an open-plan living area with floor-to-ceiling windows revealing the city
three security guards become visible standing in the living area near the windows

agents.ego_description: moving through the spacious living room toward the panoramic windows to observe the Night City skyline

notable_agents.action: three security guards in tactical gear standing in formation, observing the area

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling glass windows overlooking the neon-lit cityscape
Night City skyline with illuminated skyscrapers and holographic advertisements
black leather couch positioned near a modern floor lamp
large rectangular planter containing green foliage
round dark table with magazines and items on top

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the kitchen into a spacious luxury living room with panoramic views of Night City through floor-to-ceiling windows. Three security guards stand near the center of the room as the player moves toward the window to take in the neon-lit skyline.

events.description: turns toward the doorway and approaches the exit leading to the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking past the security guards and heading toward the doorway leading to the upper level staircase

notable_agents.action: security guard with red cap and tactical vest watching the player pass by
guard with distinctive red hair and armor standing alert near the doorway

entered.detail: glass double doors with metal frames leading to the staircase area
oval-shaped illuminated wall fixtures with warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the three security guards in the foyer area, heading toward a doorway that leads to the upper levels. The guards stand aside as the player approaches the glass exit doors, with wall sconces providing warm illumination in the transition space.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern staircase with red accent lighting

events.description: begins ascending the wooden staircase toward the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the modern wooden staircase with glass railings and red illuminated edges

entered.detail: wooden stairs with glass railing and red LED accent lighting on the edges
transparent glass railing with metal handrail
red LED strips illuminating the edges of each stair tread

segments.scene_description: The player passes through the doorway and enters a stairwell, ascending a modern wooden staircase featuring glass railings and distinctive red LED accent lighting along the steps. The environment shifts to a more enclosed, vertical space as the player climbs toward the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxury high-rise apartment that transitions from a neon-lit interior to an ascending vertical corridor. It begins in a sleek, modern kitchen defined by teal under-cabinet lighting and a large wooden island, before gliding forward into a spacious living room. As the camera moves toward floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the neon skyline of Night City, it passes three security guards stationed in the foyer. The scene then shifts through a doorway illuminated by warm wall sconces, leading away from the open living area and into a more enclosed stairwell. Finally, the camera ascends a modern wooden staircase with glass railings, following red LED accent lighting as it climbs toward the upper level.
